mnemonics.title: CPU Component Roles
mnemonics.content: **C**ommanding **U**nit (CU) tells **A**ll **L**ogical **U**nits (ALU) what to do. **R**egisters are the **R**apid **R**esponse **R**am (for data).

mnemonics.title: Instruction Cycle
mnemonics.content: **F**ind the **D**irections, **D**ecide what they **M**ean, **D**o the **E**xercise (Fetch, Decode, Execute).
